name: Memory Crystal
description: Persistent memory for AI agents via Memory Crystal

defaultRecallMode.description: Default recall mode for this agent. Controls which memory stores and categories are prioritized.

defaultRecallLimit.description: Default number of memories to recall per query.

channelScope.description: Optional. When set, all API calls are namespaced as {channelScope}:{peerId}. Use for multi-tenant or per-agent isolation. Example: 'coach'

localSummaryInjection.description: Enable prompt-aware local summary injection. When true, relevant summaries from the local store are injected into the context window based on the current user query.

localSummaryMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens to spend on injected relevant local summaries.
